## [00:00 - 01:27]

Hi, I'm Dave Long. I'm a co-founder and CEO of Orange Theory Fitness. We chose VIN as one of our keynote speakers at our annual franchise conference. So I was able to see the power of his communication and his keynote firsthand. And from that point on, I started to explore ways to leverage what I've seen him do and came across obviously the workshop that I'm at and signed up and I'm here doing it. One of my goals is, unfortunately connected with the company that I am, is really to change the world and to give people more life. And so fortunate that we have more than 20,000 individuals across the world that are very skilled and are actually very skilled communicators to motivate, inspire and support people to get healthier and drive themselves for more life. And I want to really inspire that group to continue to do their good work and do it even better. Building that toolkit of communication can enhance all parts of every person's life. I've been to a number of different courses and different areas, leadership courses and different things. And I think the style of this, the interactiveness, and I think most importantly the real toolkit that you can walk away with is second to none.
